description: Canonical schema for registering Archon Prime analysis tools. Every tool registered in archon_tool_index.json must conform to this schema.

fields.name: tool_name
fields.description: Filename of the tool script (e.g. repo_mapper.py).

fields.name: analysis_domain
fields.description: Subdirectory of MODULES/analysis that owns this tool.

fields.name: execution_stage
fields.description: Ordinal stage in the Archon pipeline. Lower numbers execute first.

fields.name: execution_entry
fields.description: Name of the callable entry point (function or class). Null if the script runs at module level.

fields.name: dependencies
fields.description: List of stage keys (from archon_tool_index.json) that must complete before this tool runs. Empty array if none.

fields.name: expected_inputs
fields.description: Filenames or environment variables this tool reads as inputs.

fields.name: output_artifacts
fields.description: Filenames this tool writes to OUTPUT_ROOT. Must be non-empty.

fields.name: mutation_capability
fields.description: True if the tool modifies any file outside OUTPUT_ROOT. Governance-fail-closed: tools with mutation_capability=true require explicit authorization.
